info.title: Bike Rental API
info.description:
REST API for Bike Rental Service.

## Authentication

This API uses JWT Bearer tokens for authentication. To authenticate:

1. Register a new account using `/api/v1/auth/register` or login using `/api/v1/auth/login`
2. Use the returned `access_token` in the `Authorization` header as `Bearer <token>`
3. When the access token expires, use the `refresh_token` with `/api/v1/auth/refresh` to get new tokens

## Rate Limiting

- Authentication endpoints: 10 requests/minute
- Payment endpoints: 30 requests/minute
- General API endpoints: 100 requests/minute

## Error Handling

All errors follow a consistent format with `timestamp`, `status`, `error`, `message`, and `path` fields.

409.description: Rental already completed or concurrent modification

get.summary: Get all stations with optional filtering

404.description: User, bicycle or station not found

409.description: Bicycle already rented or user cannot rent

get.summary: Get all payments with optional username filter
Get all bicycles with optional filtering by model

post.description: Creates a new user account and returns authentication tokens
Uses a valid refresh token to obtain new access and refresh tokens
Revokes all refresh tokens for the current user
Authenticates user credentials and returns access and refresh tokens

409.description: Request already pending for this user

get.summary: Get all bicycles at a station

get.description: Returns information about the currently authenticated user

get.summary: Get admin request by user ID

password.description: Password (min 8 characters, must include letter and number)

refresh_token.description: Refresh token for obtaining new access tokens

expires_in.description: Access token expiration time in seconds

value.error: Too many requests. Please try again later.

bearerAuth.description: JWT access token. Obtain via `/api/v1/auth/login` or `/api/v1/auth/register`
